title: Duplicate Activity on Calendar
excerpt: Hello. When I add a “call” activity, the entry on the calendar displays twice. Any ideas how to stop this so there’s only one entry?

posts.author: KC108 (Keith Coomber)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello. When I add a “call” activity, the entry on the calendar displays twice. Any ideas how to stop this so there’s only one entry?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Keith! Do you have any automations or calendar integration recipes set up that would create an event? It might be worth double checking! If that doesn’t fix anything, shoot our support team a message here and we’ll troubleshoot it together!

posts.author: KC108 (Keith Coomber)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Charlotte. I reached out to the support team and they discovered we had both a start date and and end date in the settings which is why it added two entries.
